backend/main.mo: Empty Motoko actor serving as a placeholder backend with no implemented functionality.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting a high-confidence fix for the click-to-open toggle interaction on the Envelope component, referencing the relevant file and test ID.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document summarizing each frontend source file's purpose, styling details, and key implementation notes for the romantic letter web app.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point defining OKLCH-based CSS custom property color tokens for light and dark themes, including sidebar, chart, and destructive color variants.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point that loads Google Fonts (Cinzel, Great Vibes, Dancing Script, Playfair Display, Poppins) and mounts the React app with the title 'For My Cutee'.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root app component rendering a dark radial-gradient background with a persistent StarBackground, a centered Envelope wrapping LetterContent, and a fixed footer with a caffeine.ai attribution link.
frontend/src/components/EntryButton.tsx: Empty file with no implemented component.
frontend/src/components/Envelope.tsx: Interactive envelope component with a burgundy body, animated top flap, wax seal, and a letter panel that rises out when clicked, toggling open/closed state via useState.
frontend/src/components/FloatingHearts.t: Empty file with no implemented component.
Empty file with no implemented component.
frontend/src/components/HeartCanvas.tsx: Empty file with no implemented component.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Empty file with no implemented component.
Decorative letter surface component with a wine-toned gradient background, gold border, corner ornaments, backdrop blur, bloomIn animation, and a scrollable inner content area.
frontend/src/components/LetterContent.ts: Renders the romantic letter body addressed to Priya, styled with Dancing Script headers, Playfair Display body text, a gold ornament divider, and a cursive signature footer.
frontend/src/components/MusicControl.tsx: Empty file with no implemented component.
frontend/src/components/ReplayButton.tsx: Empty file with no implemented component.
frontend/src/components/SealButton.tsx: Gold pill-shaped button labeled 'To My Priya ✉️' with a radial gradient, Cinzel font, gold glow box-shadow, and hover scale/glow effects via inline event handlers.
frontend/src/components/StarBackground.t: Renders an animated background with 90 twinkling/drifting star particles and 10 floating heart/sparkle shapes using randomized CSS animations and inline styles.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor (authenticated or anonymous) using React Query, and invalidates dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useBackgroundMusic.ts: Empty file reserved for a background music hook.
frontend/src/hooks/useHeartAnimation.ts: Empty file reserved for a heart animation hook.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an Internet Identity authentication context and hook, managing login/logout state via DFINITY's AuthClient and exposing identity, status flags, and login/clear functions.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Placeholder file with no active exports, reserved for future React Query backend integration hooks.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet defining Tailwind base/utilities, CSS design tokens (gold, dark, envelope colors), custom font utilities, and keyframe animations (envelope flap, letter bloom, etc.).
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app wrapped in QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the theme with custom colors (gold, oklch tokens), fonts (Cinzel, Great Vibes, Playfair, etc.), shadows, border radii, and keyframe animations.
project_state.json: Project state metadata tracking version, existing features, and a known issue: the 'Click to Open' envelope interaction is not functioning correctly and needs a fix.
